title: Add and verify R1 Neo puck overlay after puck CRC link fix
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-ev5b.4. A provisional R1 Neo puck overlay reached compile but lichen/apps/puck failed link with undefined crc32_ieee despite the app-level CRC intent. The MVP board target is gateway/L2/BLE, so do not land the unverified puck overlay in ev5b.4. Fix the puck CRC dependency, add the R1 Neo puck board files back, and verify west build -b r1_neo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck.
notes: Completed no-hardware R1 Neo puck board support. Added lichen/apps/puck/boards/r1_neo_nrf52840.overlay selecting zephyr,lora = &lora0, lichen,native-uart = &cdc_acm_uart0, and enabling &lora0. Added lichen/apps/puck/boards/r1_neo_nrf52840.conf for SX1262 LoRa, LICHEN Native over USB CDC-ACM, serial-local HAL capability, R1 Neo board name/buttons/LEDs/tracker profile, and battery voltage-divider capability while keeping display/GNSS/PMIC/external flash disabled pending validation. Baseline EC2 build before overlay failed on disabled lora0 device symbol __device_dts_ord_96 in lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lora_l2.c, confirming the missing overlay issue; it did compile Zephyr CRC objects, so historical crc32_ieee issue is already handled by app prj.conf CONFIG_CRC=y. Reviews: Halley mapped expected board files and risks; Mill confirmed crc32_ieee should be resolved by CONFIG_CRC=y and no manual CMake link; independent codereviews Jason and Kant both found P2 missing CONFIG_ZCBOR for CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE, fixed by adding CONFIG_ZCBOR=y; no remaining P0/P1/P2. Local git diff --check passed. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-puck: final command west build -p always -b r1_neo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build-r1-neo-puck-final -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-puck/lichen ; PASS. Memory FLASH 113144 B / 1 MB (10.79%), RAM 37184 B / 256 KB (14.18%), IDT_LIST 0/32 KB. Generated .config includes CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_SERIAL_LOCAL=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BATTERY=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, CONFIG_ZCBOR=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y, CONFIG_SENSOR=y, CONFIG_VOLTAGE_DIVIDER=y, CONFIG_CRC=y. Generated DTS has zephyr,lora = &lora0, lichen,native-uart = &cdc_acm_uart0, battery0 = &vbatt, lora0: lora@0, vbatt compatible voltage-divider. Notable warnings: Nordic duplicate unit-address warnings for clock/power and acl/flash-controller, USB_CDC_ACM_LOG_LEVEL forced to LOG_LEVEL_NONE. Physical R1 Neo radio/GNSS/display validation remains out of scope for this build-only Bead.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware R1 Neo puck overlay/config support and verified west build -b r1_neo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck on EC2; physical radio/GNSS/display validation remains out of scope/hardware-gated.
